nasb.text: Then the king said to the Cushite, “Is it well with the young man Absalom?” And the Cushite answered, “Let the enemies of my lord the king, and all who rise up against you for evil, be as that young man!”

esv.text: The king said to the Cushite, “Is it well with the young man Absalom?” And the Cushite answered, “May the enemies of my lord the king and all who rise up against you for evil be like that young man.”

cnv.text: 王問古實人：“那年輕人押沙龍平安嗎？”古實人回答：“願我主我王的仇敵和一切來攻擊你、傷害你的人，都像那年輕人一樣。”

ccb.text: 王问古示人：“年轻的押沙龙平安吗？”古示人答道：“愿我主我王的仇敌和一切要加害我王的人，下场都与那青年一样。”
